name: Luna the Dark Spirit
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>闇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ルーナ
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 DARK monster from your GY. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Inflict 500 damage to your opponent.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 DARK monster from your GY. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Inflict 500 damage to your opponent.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 DARK monster from your GY. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Inflict 500 damage to your opponent.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
